H2: Domed Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Create Custom Domed Decals

Professional 3D Domed Decals for Branding & Marketing

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Quantity Design Upload File Upload Artwork Services Proof Approval Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Domed Decals for Professional Branding

Create eye-catching custom domed decals that make your brand stand out with a professional 3D appearance. Our domed decals feature a crystal clear polyurethane coating that creates a raised, glossy finish while providing superior protection against weathering, scratches, and fading. See also [thank you stickers](https://www.decals.com/thank-you-stickers).

Each domed decal is screenprinted as a die-cut design with a protective polyurethane dome that enhances colors and adds dimensional depth. These premium decals are ideal for product labeling, equipment branding, and promotional applications where durability and visual impact are essential.

Our domed decals are manufactured using high-quality materials and precision craftsmanship to ensure consistent results. The polyurethane coating provides waterproof, weatherproof, and chemical-resistant properties, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Domed Decal Ordering & Design Process

Ordering your custom domed decals is straightforward with our streamlined process designed for quality results. You can either design your decals using our online designer or upload your own artwork files for professional production.

Design Process

Choose from two design methods: create your design from scratch using our online designer with clipart and text tools, or upload your own artwork files. For uploaded files, we require .EPS format to ensure the highest quality reproduction in the domed decal printing process.

Once you add domed decals to your cart and select shipping options, you'll receive an email proof for review. This proof allows you to verify colors, layout, and sizing before production begins.

Payment

All domed decal orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards, as well as checks that must be received prior to production start.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your domed decal order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order progress through every stage of production and shipping, from initial processing to final delivery.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Domed Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our domed decals require specialized manufacturing processes that ensure superior quality and durability. The production timeline reflects our commitment to precision craftsmanship and quality control at every stage.

Standard Production Timeline

Current production time for domed decals is approximately four weeks from proof approval and payment. This extended timeline allows for the specialized screening, coating, and curing processes required to achieve the distinctive 3D dome effect and superior durability characteristics.

The production process includes multiple stages: initial screening, polyurethane application, controlled curing, quality inspection, and final die-cutting. Each stage requires precise timing and environmental controls to ensure consistent results.

Production Considerations

Production begins only after proof approval and full payment. The specialized nature of domed decal manufacturing requires dedicated equipment and controlled environmental conditions, which contributes to the extended production timeline but ensures exceptional quality results.

For urgent projects or questions about current production capacity, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss your specific timeline requirements.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Domed Decal Materials & Construction

Our domed decals are manufactured using premium materials and specialized processes to deliver exceptional durability and visual appeal. Understanding the construction helps you select the right application method for your specific needs.

Die-Cut Construction

Domed decals are produced as die-cut decals with precise edge cutting that follows your design contours. This construction method provides clean edges and professional appearance while allowing the polyurethane dome to extend to the design perimeter.

The die-cutting process occurs after the doming application, ensuring that both the base material and polyurethane coating are cut cleanly in a single operation. This prevents edge separation and maintains the weatherproof seal.

Sheet Format Supply

Custom domed decals are supplied in 10" x 12.5" sheet format rather than individual pieces or roll format. This sheet format protects the raised dome surface during shipping and provides convenient handling for application.

The sheet format allows multiple domed decals to be produced efficiently while maintaining the precision required for the specialized doming process. Individual decals are separated from the sheet during the final die-cutting stage.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Domed Decal Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation is essential for achieving optimal results with domed decals. The specialized printing and coating processes require specific file formats and setup guidelines to ensure crisp reproduction and proper dome application.

Preferred File Types

EPS, AI, PSD, and high-resolution PDF files provide the best results for domed decal production. High-resolution JPG and TIF files are also acceptable for photographic elements. GIF and PUB files cannot be processed due to format limitations.

File Setup Requirements

All fonts must be converted to outlines to prevent substitution issues during production. Set up artwork at proportionate size to your ordered dimensions, and provide non-photographic elements in vector format when possible. Photographic images require 300 DPI resolution for crisp reproduction under the polyurethane dome.

Clearly indicate cut lines for die-cutting accuracy, and specify PMS colors when color matching is critical. Include all linked graphics and avoid flattening PSD layers to maintain editing flexibility during production setup.

Design Services

Professional brewery stickers and logo recreation services are available starting at $15 for simple designs. Complex artwork may require individual quoting. This service includes vectorization and file optimization specifically for domed decal production, with recreated artwork kept on file for future orders.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Domed Decal Shipping & Delivery

Domed decals ship within 2-4 business days after production completion to most United States locations. Standard shipping uses UPS Ground service unless alternative methods are specified during ordering.

Shipping Methods

Multiple shipping speeds are available: Economy (5-15 days), Standard UPS Ground (3-5 business days), Three Day service, Two Day service, and Overnight delivery. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination and requires complete address information including P.O. Box details when applicable.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time is separate from the four-week production timeline. Once domed decals complete production and quality inspection, they enter the shipping process with tracking information provided via email.

Important Shipping Notes

International shipping is available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Only USPS and UPS international labels are accepted. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5250 for international shipping coordination and requirements.

The sheet format packaging protects the raised dome surfaces during transit while providing secure handling for delivery personnel.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Domed Decal Application & Installation

Proper application technique ensures maximum adhesion and longevity for your domed decals. The raised dome surface requires specific handling methods to achieve professional results without damaging the polyurethane coating.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol to remove dirt, oils, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before beginning application. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like metal, glass, and hard plastics provide optimal adhesion for domed decals.

Applying the Domed Decal

Remove the backing paper carefully to avoid touching the adhesive. Position the domed decal precisely before initial contact, as repositioning may damage the dome or reduce adhesive strength. Apply firm, even pressure around the perimeter and base areas, avoiding excessive pressure on the raised dome center.

Final Installation Steps

Work out air bubbles by pressing from the center toward the edges, using light pressure to avoid dome damage. For rounded corner labels and similar applications, ensure complete edge adhesion to maintain the weatherproof seal that protects the underlying adhesive.

Allow 24-48 hours for full adhesive cure before exposing domed decals to moisture, temperature extremes, or mechanical stress. This curing period ensures maximum bond strength and long-term durability.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Domed Decals?

Domed decals are specialized adhesive graphics featuring a raised polyurethane coating that creates a three-dimensional appearance and enhanced durability. These decals consist of a printed base layer covered with a clear, dome-shaped polyurethane resin that magnifies colors while providing superior protection against environmental damage. The polyurethane dome creates a permanent seal that makes the decals waterproof, chemical-resistant, and highly resistant to scratching, fading, and UV damage, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor applications on products, equipment, and vehicles.

Design Your Custom Domed Decals Today

Transform your branding with professional domed decals that deliver exceptional durability and visual impact. Our specialized manufacturing process ensures consistent quality and long-lasting performance for your most demanding applications.

Ready to create custom domed decals for your business? Upload your artwork or start designing online to experience the superior quality and craftsmanship that sets our domed decals apart. Our team is ready to help you achieve outstanding results with premium 3D decal solutions.

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 for specialized guidance on artwork preparation, application recommendations, or custom project requirements. We're here to ensure your domed decal project exceeds expectations.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Domed Decal FAQs

What materials are used in domed decals?

Domed decals are constructed with a screenprinted base layer and a crystal clear polyurethane top coat that creates the characteristic raised dome appearance. The polyurethane coating provides waterproof, weatherproof, and chemical-resistant properties while enhancing color vibrancy and adding dimensional depth to the printed design.

How long do domed decals last outdoors?

Domed decals typically last 5-7 years in outdoor applications due to their protective polyurethane coating. The dome provides superior resistance to UV fading, scratches, chemicals, salt, acid, and oil exposure, with self-healing properties that help recover from minor surface damage automatically.

What surfaces work best for domed decal application?

Smooth, clean, non-porous surfaces like metal, glass, and hard plastics provide optimal adhesion for domed decals. The strong adhesive bonds permanently to properly prepared surfaces while the polyurethane dome maintains flexibility to accommodate minor surface variations without cracking.

Can domed decals be customized to specific shapes and sizes?

Yes, domed decals are die-cut to follow your custom design contours and can be produced in various sizes within our production capabilities. The die-cutting process occurs after dome application to ensure clean edges and proper polyurethane coating coverage to the design perimeter.

What file format works best for domed decal artwork?

EPS files provide the best results for domed decal artwork because they maintain vector quality and color accuracy during the specialized screening and coating process. High-resolution PDF, AI, and PSD files are also acceptable, while all fonts should be converted to outlines for consistent reproduction.

How should domed decals be stored before application?

Store domed decals in their original sheet format in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight until application. The sheet format protects the raised dome surfaces from damage while maintaining adhesive integrity. Avoid stacking heavy objects on top of the sheets to prevent dome compression.

Are domed decals removable without surface damage?

Domed decals are designed for permanent application and may be difficult to remove completely due to their strong adhesive bond. While removal is possible with heat application and careful techniques, some adhesive residue may remain, and the process may affect certain surface finishes, particularly vehicle paint.
